## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ChevronDown;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ChevronDown { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
backwards, reverse, slow, dropdown

## Categories
arrows, gaming

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/chevron-down)
